prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-SON-IFESFS-STD-BLCK Product Type: MECHANICAL_LIGHTER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Emergency Pocket Instant Lighter Fire Stick Starter Survival Tool with Keychain and Compass Description: The ASR Outdoor Emergency Match Lighter Fire Stick Starter Survival Tool Keychain with Compass is an essential survival tool and everyday carry item to keep in your skiing backpack, bug out bag, emergency preparedness kit, camping gear or survival bag. Compact and lightweight, this fire stick starter tool is reusable, easy to maneuver and a cinch to pack with you, no matter what outdoor activities you have planned.

Lightweight and compact design
Easy to carry with included keychain
Reusable; will ignite over 5,000+ times.

In addition to starting fires for emergency or cooking scenarios, you can also use the instant lighter fire stick starter tool for starting barbecues, lighting a lantern or camping lantern, an oil lamp, a Bunsen burner, a blow torch, fire pits outdoor, fireplaces or candles. It is safe to use in a kitchen setting, as it will not smoke or set off smoke or fire alarms.

The ASR Outdoor Emergency Pocket Instant Lighter Fire Stick Starter Survival Tool is truly an essential survival tool you’ll want to add to your outdoor gear, survival gear, camping gear or hiking backpack, and you’ll always be ready for any emergency, natural disaster, power outage or off-grid survival situation. Search Terms: multi tool utility tool tools ASR outdoors survival survival kit camping hiking backpacking trekking skiing bug out bag snowboarding emergency preparedness kit emergency kit emergency survival gear fire starter survival survival Features: - EMERGENCY FIRE STICK STARTER SURVIVAL TOOL: Camping, hiking, trekking, skiing or backpacking, wherever you are in the wilderness be sure to pack this match style fire stick starter tool with the rest of your survival gear so you can easily start a fire anywhere anytime; and as a bonus, a built in compass will help to keep you on course if you’re lost in the wilderness - THOUSANDS OF LIGHTS: This amazing fire stick fire starter survival tool holds 2ml of lighter fluid and will ignite over 15,000 times, never leaving you without a fire whether in an emergency situation, for cooking or for roasting marshmallows with the kids around the campfire - PORTABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Attached to an included keychain, the emergency match lighter fire stick is easily transportable and lightweight; secure it alongside your keys or on a lanyard, on a backpack strap or loop, with a carabiner or toss it in your bug out bag or survival kit with other small everyday carry items or outdoor survival tools - EASY TO USE: Simply pull the fire stick starter out of the casing; the lighter survival tool will start a fire every time you strike the magnesium fire stick against the outer aluminum striking plate just like you would do using a regular match - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.5lbs; Dimensions: 2.5 x 0.75 inches; Magnesium Rod: 1.25 inches; Fuel: Lighter fluid; Fuel capacity: 2ml; Keychain and compass included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Emergency Fire Stick Starter Survival Tool
